## Files NOT Allowed To Change

## Review Checks
- Scope stays within this issue
- Tests or explicit test gap documented
- Security impact considered
- Docs updated when behavior or workflow changes
- Trading logic checked against `docs/STRATEGY_AND_ALERTS.md` when relevant

(Optional)
